Name: Fedica 2.0
Tagline: Publish and grow your profile across social apps
Description: For creators who want to succeed when their fans are fragmented across platforms. Know who engages, what they care about, and where they're from, with deep audience segmentation and demographics. Publish tailored posts on 12+ platforms. Connect with engagers from one inbox. 15 years of audience intelligence, built on Tweepsmap's geographic foundation. We put the people back in your analytics.

Name: The new Firecrawl /search
Tagline: Our most accurate /search yet that uses 10x fewer tokens.
Description: Search is how AI agents ground themselves in the web, but reading full pages for every query burns tokens fast. We trained a model that returns the excerpts from each /search result that best answer your query, giving your AI agents highly relevant context from every page. It outperforms processing full pages while using 10x fewer tokens. On SimpleQA, AI agents using Firecrawl /search now score 94.7%, higher than any other provider. It's live today on every /search call.

Name: Pushary
Tagline: Approve AI requests from your lock screen
Description: One command connects your AI agents to your lock screen. When Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Hermes, or Claude Cowork stops to ask, you tap yes from your phone and the run keeps moving. New in this launch: native iPhone and Android apps. Pairing is a QR code you scan from the terminal, no key to paste. Per-tool policies auto-approve the safe reads. Every decision lands in an audit trail.

Name: Fluree AI
Tagline: Give every AI agent trusted context
Description: Fluree AI gives every app and AI agent the same trusted context from your company data. Ask questions and get cited, verifiable answers from one live data layer, with permissions checked on every request. Instead of rebuilding prompts or relying on RAG guesses, Fluree queries structured data directly and connects to MCP-ready agents, dashboards, and apps in minutes.

Name: MinkNote
Tagline: Private macOS notes built on plain Markdown files
Description: MinkNote is a native macOS notes and journal app built on plain Markdown files you own. No database, no account, and no vendor lock-in. Organise work with projects, journals, tags, fast search, rich text or Markdown editing, and automatic image organisation in one private, local-first workspace.

Name: Buzz
Tagline: Your people, your agents, your project — all in one place
Description: a new groupchat platform for teams of people and agents of all sizes, built to reduce our dependency on slack and github. model-agnostic, decentralized, self-sovereign, and open source. 🐝

Name: YC has it
Tagline: Describe your problem, get the YC startup that solves it
Description: Describe your problem in plain English. ychasit searches 4,000+ active YC companies and finds the startups that solve it, with reasoning, pricing, and integrations. 100% Free forever. No login. No signup.

Name: HarnessRouter
Tagline: Bring the world's best AI agents into your app, with one API
Description: Building an AI agent backend yourself takes months: sandboxes, orchestration, retries, cost controls. HarnessRouter runs it for you. One API in, finished work out: code, files, videos, games. Trusted by top medical research institutions, leading healthcare companies, and cutting-edge startups in multiple domains.

Name: Freesolo Flash
Tagline: Full-Stack Platform for Training Small Language Models
Description: Freesolo helps enterprise teams turn generic model capability into AI features that belong in the product. We make reinforcement learning a commodity so any team can train a small, specialized model for their task.

Name: Prosed
Tagline: The AI book service that shows its work
Description: Most AI book services work like a black box. Your content goes in, a manuscript comes out, and you hope it sounds like you. We thought creators deserved more than hope. The Source Map color-codes every paragraph in your manuscript: your original words from newsletters, podcasts, and posts alongside the connective tissue Prosed added to bridge your ideas together. Today, over 90% of each book we assembled is the creator's own words. Now you can see that for yourself.

Name: HealthyNotch
Tagline: Work shouldn't cost you your health
Description: You've been at your desk for six hours. Haven't had water since breakfast. Neck locked in one position, eyes dry from the screen. You didn't even notice until now. HealthyNotch lives quietly in your Mac's notch and nudges you before it gets that far: stand up, drink water, blink, stretch. No dock icon, no logging, no dashboards. One-time payment, lifetime access, no subscription.

Name: Hotspot Meter
Tagline: A private data-usage meter for your Mac menu bar
Description: Hotspot Meter is a free macOS menu-bar app that shows exactly how much data each Wi-Fi network and phone hotspot uses. See live download and upload speeds, track session and per-network totals, review usage history, and get an alert before reaching your data cap. Everything runs locally on your Mac: no analytics, no accounts, and no personal data collected or transmitted.

Name: Liso
Tagline: Highlight text on any page and turn it into audio.
Description: Highlight any article, newsletter, blog post, or page on the internet. Liso instantly turns it into beautiful audio. Your personal audiobook, built from the things you actually want to read.

Name: Matthew Slack Perth Executive Leadership
Tagline: Executive Leadership Focused on Growth and Innovation
Description: Matthew Slack Perth combines commercial expertise with executive leadership to help organisations achieve operational excellence and long-term success. His background across government, mining, healthcare, infrastructure, technology, and commercial enterprise enables him to develop practical strategies that improve governance, strengthen business performance, and support sustainable organisational development.

Name: OpenWorker
Tagline: Local-first desktop agent for everyday work
Topics: Productivity, Open Source, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub
Description: OpenWorker is an AI agent that runs on your own computer, works in your everyday tools, and turns what you ask into finished deliverables — checking in before anything important. Free, open source, bring your own model.

Name: AngelList Link
Tagline: An MCP server for GPs
Description: AngelList Link is an MCP server for GPs to turn your fund into something you can talk to. One source of truth. Verified answers. Daily financials. Queryable from Claude, ChatGPT, or any AI tool you already work from. Ask a question about your own fund — capital call status, LP holdings across vehicles, a valuation update — and get an answer instantly. This is agentic fund management: the system of record for more than 25,000 funds and SPVs, queryable from any AI tool.

Name: Buska
Tagline: Turn social media buying signals into pipeline
Description: Buska monitors Twitter, Reddit, LinkedIn and 30+ platforms for buying signals in real time. Every mention is AI-scored from 0 to 100 based on buying intent and matched to your ICP. You only see the leads worth your time. When a hot lead surfaces, Reply Studio generates a contextual reply in seconds. Export directly to HubSpot, Salesforce, Lemlist, or any tool via webhook. 2,000+ sales and growth teams. 7-day free trial, no credit card.

Name: The Modern Shrine
Tagline: Clearer decisions in life and work using ancient wisdom
Description: The Modern Shrine helps people make clearer decisions in modern life and work - by combining AI, human behavior, and ancient pattern systems into practical decision tools. It's a decision calibration system for analytical people who have all the information and still don't trust their next move. A former machine learning engineer, I combine AI, behavioral psychology, and ancient pattern systems what I call old school machine learning - into practical tools for modern decisions.

Name: Reach
Tagline: The operating system to win AI search.
Description: Reach is the operating system to win AI search. Your marketing team and AI agents work in one place, doing the work that actually gets you recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google in the prompts that matter for your buyer journey. From finding the demand, to executing content, mentions and community, to measuring and attributing the revenue.

Name: Waterlogue for Android
Tagline: Your watercolor camera
Description: Waterlogue, the popular iOS app that’s been around for over a decade, is finally available on Android. It has feature parity with the iOS version. The image processing doesn’t use gen AI for the watercolor effect.
